format_discipline.note: No frontmatter; first non-empty line is the # H1. Sidecar reading.meta.json present and parses with word_count, estimated_read_minutes, citations_used, sections. Exactly six ## sections in canonical order: Overview, Key Concepts, Worked Example, In Practice, Key Takeaways, References.

length.note: Within STANDARD range. Near-floor by design for an intuition-only course; per instruction not hard-failed on near-floor count alone. read-aloud ~5.6 min (words/230); meta estimate 7 min at 200 wpm.

citations.note: Markers [1][2][3] all used inline; bibliography lists [1][2][3] matching exactly. All primary resources cited at least once. No orphan markers or orphan entries; no fabricated markers.

no_forward_refs.note: By-hand F1 compute deferred to 8.5 as a bare name-and-pointer (line 70). Accuracy named-and-deferred to 8.5 as a bare pointer (line 95). No ROC, calibration, or F-beta variants taught. F-score/F1 alternate-name mention is naming only, not teaching variants. 8.3 precision/recall reused as permitted. No confusion-matrix construction taught.

faithfulness.note: Sampled assertions (Model A/B values, plain-avg 0.5 on 1.0/0.0, harmonic-mean-toward-lower, F1 formula, worked table 0.64/0.65, leaderboard/check-in/imbalanced use cases, when-to-use table, cancer-screening recall-first caution) all trace to corpus. 'Team carrying a load / weakest member' is an explanatory analogy, not a new factual claim.

beginner_readability.note: Terms defined at first use (F1, harmonic mean, arithmetic mean); precision/recall reused from 8.3 as allowed. Concrete-first (spam-catcher example precedes the abstraction). No hedging. Sentences within plain register.

formatting.note: Chunked prose, paragraphs at or under 4 sentences. A/B comparison table (worked example) and when-to-use F1-vs-separate table both retained. Bold-term/plain-meaning definitions. Inline examples present beyond the Worked Example section.

scope.note: Stays on the headline (combining precision and recall into one F1 via the harmonic mean). Formula stated but by-hand computation explicitly deferred. No scope_creep.

diagram_embedded.note: Inline embed at line 51 ![...](./diagram.png) with descriptive caption. embeds_diagram=true in meta. PNG presence confirmed by orchestrator (long-path read artifact only); not raising png-absent.

verdict: PASS — reading 8.4 meets all reading-critic checks: 1290 words (in STANDARD range, near-floor by design), six canonical sections, faithful citations [1][2][3], 8.5 by-hand-compute and accuracy named-and-deferred only, on-headline scope (harmonic mean is the core mechanism), beginner tone with both tables retained, and the diagram embedded inline.
